payload.note: pkr-fix started: FIX-1 run-suite fail-closed, FIX-2 T-4 daemon machine-run, FIX-3 T-3 natural cadence fired; located reference solutions under workers/pkr-t*/reference-solution + dkr-5 (T-7)

FIX-3: T-3 frozenClock records every(); new b8 fires a recorded tick — reference passes 11/11, clock.every-stripped twin fails exactly b8 (exit 1). FIX-2: T-4 new b6 spawns node --import tsx bin/daemon.ts, feeds 2 wire lines, asserts report-position/low-battery-sweep/dispatch/resolve entries in daemon stdout trail — reference passes 8/8, unaudited-second-scope twin daemon (smoke exit 0, valid JSON) fails exactly b6 (exit 1). Evidence: workers/pkr-fix/gates/fix2-*,fix3-*. No TASK.md changes needed (T-3 R7 and T-4 R5 already state the contracts). Next: FIX-1 fail-closed verification via full reference suite run

All 3 CHAL-3 fixes landed and re-verified. FIX-1: run-suite.sh clears per-task result dirs + suite.json pre-run; run-task.sh clears its result dir, writes an up-front failed verdict (ABORTED_BEFORE_VERDICT), and writes explicit failed verdicts on INSTANTIATE_FAILED and ENTRYPOINT_AMBIGUOUS (both now also rm workspace). Reference suite re-run on fixed harness: 10/10, suite_pct 100. Counterexample (pre-seeded 100% results + T-1 with two bin/*.ts): T-1 verdict admitted_score 0 reason ENTRYPOINT_AMBIGUOUS, suite_pct 100->0, COUNTEREXAMPLE-CLOSED. FIX-2: T-4 check.mjs b6-daemon-runs-shipped-audited-root spawns node --import tsx bin/daemon.ts (30s bound), feeds 2 wire lines, asserts trail in stdout dump carries 2 report-position + 1 low-battery-sweep + dispatch + resolve entries; reference 8/8 pass; unaudited-second-scope twin daemon (valid JSON, smoke exit 0, createApp intact) fails exactly b6. FIX-3: T-3 frozenClock records every() registrations; b8-natural-clock-tick-runs-production-capture fires the recorded tick and asserts the production capture flow runs; reference 11/11 pass; clock.every-stripped twin fails exactly b8. No TASK.md changes needed (T-3 R7 / T-4 R5 already state the contracts). AG-1/AG-3: checker additions pure-node deterministic (child_process spawn of the solution's own daemon, no network/randomness). AG-4: all /tmp workspaces deleted. Canonical suite/results refreshed under fixed harness.
